title: Even Better Amethyst
description: Use silk touch to relocate budding amethyst, and craft a few new decoration blocks.
body:
## Basic Information

This mod lets you use a silk touch pickaxe to collect and relocate budding amethyst, so that you can farm amethyst shards easier.

There are also some new decoration blocks added, all of whom can be seen in this image:

![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/od3DqJ7M/images/0ac1d58c7ac1237c506cb4e95a2066559d4b8ef7.png)

## Description of blocks (from left to right):

**Amethyst Crystal Block**

A compact way of storing your amethyst shards.


**Amethyst Crystal Lamp**

A block which kind of looks like purple glowstone. Emits light.


**Amethyst Redstone Lamp**

Amethyst counterpart to the ordinary Redstone Lamp. Emits light when given redstone power.


**Amethyst Stairs**

Crafted with amethyst. Perfect for inclines.


**Amethyst Wall**

Walls, now purple. 


**Amethyst Slab**

Half a block worth of Amethyst Bricks. 


**Amethyst Bricks**

Durable bricks made from amethyst. 


## Recipes:

I would highly suggest a mod such as [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see the recipes for these blocks.

## Permissions:
[Source Code (for the latest version)](https://github.com/FrozenHydrant/even-better-amethyst) is here. 

You can use this mod in your modpack and distribute it.
